title: Iconically Optimized
description: Iconically Optimized is a finely tuned modpack built for competitive PvP without sacrificing performance.
body:
Iconically Optimized is a finely tuned Minecraft modpack built for players who demand every frame, every click, and every advantage. Designed for competitive PvP and maximum performance, it blends lightweight optimization mods with PvP-focused enhancements — all without sacrificing the vanilla feel.

⚡ Features:

🚀 FPS Boosts – Tweaked with top-tier performance mods (Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, etc.)

🎯 PvP Ready – Reduced latency, improved hit registration, and smoother combat visuals

💨 Ultra Lightweight – Minimal resource usage, fast startup, and buttery-smooth gameplay

🧩 Fully Customizable – Works seamlessly with your favorite PvP clients and servers

🔧 Iconic Optimization – Hand-tuned settings for the cleanest, most responsive experience

Whether you’re fighting on competitive servers or just want your game to run at its best, Iconically Optimized delivers iconic performance for iconic players.
